title: Notre-Dame spire (la flĂ¨che) â€” Definition of Done (machine-gradable)
note: The single source of 'done'. scripts/orchestrate.mjs grades each criterion from real artifacts after the VERIFY phase and writes the verdicts into artifacts/run-summary.json; it REFUSES to enter SHIP unless every required criterion is green. Any critical:true failure halts the run. An item is green only when its check is satisfied by a real artifact â€” never self-asserted. The same file, with `building` swapped, grades any other building (rerunnable).

grading.rule: DONE = every criterion with required:true is green. Any critical:true failure is a hard stop (do not ship, do not continue).
grading.evidence_file: artifacts/run-summary.json (per-criterion verdict, the measured value/evidence, durations, overall pass/fail)
grading.principle: Done is decided by the verifier, not a human. Nothing renders without a real, cited source; measured reality is never corrected toward the rulebook.

impact.what: a real heritage tool that makes fidelity affordable; the building the world watched burn (2019) and reopen (2024); auditable provenance

demo.what: drawingâ†’3D reveal â†’ provenance toggle â†’ live demo:corrupt refusal â†’ the live spire; the recorded run captures it

autonomy.what: the verifier gate + vision sub-agent catch failures without a human; failed reports kept as proof

orchestration.what: npm run goal runs the whole flow green + responding URL + this rubric; rerunnable across buildings (Nanchan stays green)

criteria.requirement: npm run goal runs the full 8-phase flow (researchâ†’ingestâ†’deriveâ†’buildâ†’verifyâ†’loopâ†’recordâ†’ship) and exits 0
criteria.check: run-summary.json verdict == 'pass' AND process exit 0

criteria.requirement: npm run build (= research && derive && verify && next build) exits 0
criteria.check: npm run build exit code 0

criteria.requirement: Research Phase 0 emits the canonical + findings as one deterministic pipe
criteria.check: artifacts/research-findings.json has 16 verdicts + 40 gaps AND data/notre-dame-canonical.json present; byte-stable across two replay runs

criteria.requirement: Every dimension carries {provenance, source, url, rights}
criteria.check: research ingest gate reports 0 problems

criteria.requirement: Zero unsourced components â€” G09 source-registry passes (a source must resolve to the rights-cleared registry, not merely be non-empty)
criteria.check: verifier V12 + V14 pass

criteria.requirement: No fabrication: no measured/reconstructed_design node cites a non-registry source; GAP fields left unfilled (no invented numbers)
criteria.check: every source cross-refs the rights table; GAP-marked fields contain no value

criteria.requirement: No restricted assets ingested (Tallon/AGP/CNRS/blog = cite-only)
criteria.check: verifier V13 + V14 pass

criteria.requirement: Deterministic verifier (V-checks recomputed from component coords, never spec.key_dimensions, + pixel checks) passes
criteria.check: verifier-report exit 0; V08â€“V14 + P01â€“P03 all pass

criteria.requirement: Vision-verifier sub-agent passes in a fresh context
criteria.check: verifier-report.vision.status == 'pass'

criteria.requirement: Measured-reality guard (V08 for the spire; the V09-analog from Nanchan): demo:corrupt â†’ verify refuses (exit 1) â†’ demo:restore â†’ green. The build cannot ship geometry idealized toward the rulebook
criteria.check: orchestrate LOOP recorded a corruptâ†’refuse(exit 1)â†’restoreâ†’green beat

criteria.requirement: â‰Ą1 logged failâ†’reviseâ†’pass cycle; failed reports kept
criteria.check: â‰Ą1 artifacts/verifier-report.*.failed.json present alongside the passing report

criteria.requirement: Derive emits structural-spec + derivation-log; the comp() unsourced-component audit threw nothing
criteria.check: artifacts/structural-spec.notre-dame.json + derivation-log present; derive exit 0

criteria.requirement: All geometry is procedural â€” no imported meshes
criteria.check: no .glb/.gltf/.obj/.fbx import in components/ or the scene module

criteria.requirement: Provenance toggle works (colour by evidence class)
criteria.check: P03 shows all four evidence-class colours

criteria.requirement: Click-to-inspect shows FR/EN name + role + citation
criteria.check: SpireViewer Inspector present + components carry name_fr/en, role, source, url, rights

criteria.requirement: Construction-sequence animation plays (real-time Build Theater)
criteria.check: derivation-stream.notre-dame.jsonl present + SpireViewer scrubber present

criteria.requirement: Drawing â†’ 3D reveal works
criteria.check: DrawingReveal overlay present

criteria.requirement: A recorded artifacts/run-*.webm exists
criteria.check: glob artifacts/run-*.webm matches â‰Ą1 non-empty file

criteria.requirement: Live URL responds 200
criteria.check: run-summary ship.http_status == 200

criteria.requirement: Public repo (hackathon rule â€” private = DQ)
criteria.check: github.com/tangxiya-star/yingzao visibility == public

criteria.requirement: README with pitch, problem, method, source/rights table, why Fable 5, rerun instructions
criteria.check: README.md present with those sections + the rights table

criteria.requirement: Session log shows long autonomous stretches; human interventions are new-information only (not course-corrections)
criteria.check: review the session log; interventions limited to credentials/new info

criteria.requirement: Rerunnable: npm run goal works from a clean checkout and is building-parameterized; Nanchan stays green as the regression anchor
criteria.check: fresh clone + npm run goal reaches green; --building nanchan still passes
